case_title: JANICE DIANE ORTEGA VS. D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNESHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, JANICE DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNESHIP SCALES, RICARDO EACH DIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARNTERS OF D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP BAZEMORE, JOANNA EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, JANICE DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNESHIP SCALES, RICARDO EACH DIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARNTERS OF D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP BAZEMORE, JOANNA EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF D.G.R.P. A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $10,795.03 PRINCIPAL, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,098.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
